rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving visible identifier references or removing invalid clauses
Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid component type or implementation scopes
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for AGREE expressions
Align helper declaration types with the types of the expressions they represent
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
AGREE assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in valid component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not generate clauses that compare Boolean values as integers or opaque data types
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about missing EOF
